content.en:
Subsequently.

Several peak realm gods of Xuandong Mountain came to the Death Void, and then urged a mysterious super-dimensional secret technique.

This extra-dimensional secret technique can cross borders and communicate with cultivators from other realms, but the power consumed is very large and cannot be maintained for long.

Several peak realm gods in Xuandong Mountain originally didn't know this super dimensional secret technique, but the ice ghost organized a peak realm god to use a special super dimensional secret treasure to cross his consciousness beyond the super dimensional territory, find a suitable target to contact, and teach this kind of super dimensional secret technique to contact him.

Of course, those peak realm gods could refuse and ignore the Ice Ghost Organization.

But Xuandong Mountain had this intention, so he accepted this super dimensional secret technique.

Now, it's just in use.

Rumble!!!!!

Urging the super-dimensional secret technique, the consciousness of the god of the six caves accompanied this super-dimensional secret technique, crossed the long territory of the Death Void, and finally came to the boundary super-dimensional barrier, and then easily passed through the boundary super-dimensional barrier~.

I don't know how long it has been, but the consciousness of the gods of the Six Caves Realm has come to a realm of consciousness.

Here, he met the pinnacle realm god of the Ice Ghost Organization, the Ziya Realm God.

The strength of the Ziya Realm God is very close to the half-step transcendent realm, and in the eyes of the Six Cave Realm Gods, its true combat power is estimated to be no weaker than the existence of the Blood Shadow Puppet.

Of course, this is just his guess.

However, the Ziya Realm God is the peak realm god in the top three in the strength of the Ice Ghost Organization.

At this time, when the god of the Six Caves Realm saw the god of the Ziya Realm, his consciousness seemed to tremble, and this was where the gap in consciousness was.

"I've seen the God of the Tooth Realm!"

The Six Cave Realm God said politely.

It wasn't the first time he'd seen a god in the Ziya Realm, but the last time it was just a little talking.

This time, it's the real deal.

"Six Cave Realm God, meet again, it seems that you are ready to cooperate with our Ice Ghost Organization?"

The God of the Tooth Realm smiled.

He expected that the gods of the Six Caves would come to him, and even if the other party didn't come, their Ice Ghost Organization would still forcibly invade the territory of 7362 and come to a wave of raids before the extradimensional storm.

This plan has been set within the Ice Ghost Organization for a long time and will not be changed.

But if Xuandong Mountain cooperates with them, they will pay much less price, and they can make a lot of money, and they don't need to give Xuandong Mountain any benefits.

It's a pity that not all the pinnacle realm gods of all realms are willing to cooperate with them, and often directly denounce them.

So, there aren't many territories they can really get their hands on.

"Ziya Realm God, we in Xuandong Mountain are willing to cooperate, but we need you to take us out of this territory at that time, can we choose the right territory?"

The Six Cave Realm God asked.

Ziya Realm God said: "Six Cave Realm Gods, if you want to choose a territory at will, it will definitely not work, we can't enter a territory at will." But we can promise to take you out of the territory covered by the extradimensional storm. For example, what about the 7120th Territory? You must know that the boundary extradimensional barrier seems to be connected as a whole, but the difficulty of crossing non-adjacent territories will be more than doubled, and we can only cross ten territories at most from other nearby territories, which is the limit. Therefore, it will not be easy for us to send you to the territory of 7120. "

"Yes, we agreed!"

The gods of the Six Caves answered the way.

Immediately, the gods of the Ziya Realm and the gods of the Six Caves made a contract, and both forces made a contract.

After that, the Ziya Realm God gave the Six Cave Realm God the inheritance of the super-dimensional formation, and after going back, he only needed to arrange this super-dimensional formation and activate it at the specified time.

"Ziya Realm God, when will it start?"

The Six Cave Realm God asked.

"It must be before the arrival of the Garanbao ship, otherwise the Garambo ship will come, and they will take a lot of resources, and we will lose money by then. But it's too early to go, and many peak realm gods are still collecting resources, so they naturally have to be a little late. In this way, the time is set after the six hundred billion Dao era, and this period of time is just right for you to collect materials and arrange the extradimensional formation. The god of the Tooth Realm said.

"Yes!"

The gods of the Six Caves answered the way.

At this time, the Six Cave Realm God was almost unable to support it, and his consciousness returned to the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory.

"Consciousness has returned!"

I have to say that communicating across borders, just chatting for a while consumes so much, if you chat across many borders, I am afraid that you will fall and die in an instant.

......

In the following days, Xuandong Mountain began to work hard to arrange the super-dimensional formation of the Ice Ghost Organization.

They all waited for the six hundred billion solstice years to come, and then left quickly. []

As for whether the other supreme forces will fall, they don't care.

The other supreme forces did not find the abnormality of Xuandong Mountain, and they were still looking for resources, as much as possible to collect more extradimensional resources before the arrival of the Jialanbao ship.

Time passed, and gradually, more than three hundred trillion solstice era years passed.

After such a long time, the human race gave birth to some peak realm gods.

Now, the number of peak realm gods of the human race is no less than that of some old supreme forces.

Moreover, Ye Tian had finally refined the Eternal Dao Seed to its current limit.

In other words, he is qualified to condense the eleventh eternal realm spirit.

He didn't wait long and immediately began the retreat.

......

The Terran Temple, in the void.

Ye Tian retreated here, and then took out the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass.

This is not an ordinary Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, but that extra-dimensional creature, such extra-dimensional resources are enough for him to break through 100% and condense the eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian swallowed one-tenth of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass in one gulp.

Suddenly, terrifying energy poured into the Eternal Dao Seed, helping him condense the Eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit.

This energy is too majestic, and it is extremely suitable for condensing the Eternal Realm Spirit.

Gradually, his eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit condensed, and without any problems at all, forcibly let his Eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit condense.

After another period of time, the Eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit was completely condensed and successful, and his Eternal Dao Seed was not weakened at all.

The point is that this energy is too majestic, and it is still refining his body, making his physical strength stronger and his physical strength stronger.

"I broke through and condensed the eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit, and now my strength is much stronger. "

Ye Tian muttered.

After that, he only needed to condense the twelfth Eternal Realm Spirit, and he had almost reached the extreme of normal peak realm divine cultivation.

But in order to condense the twelfth Eternal Realm Spirit, at his current rate of progress, it will take at least an extradimensional era.
